{"_id":"631963be27db1f86f617857a","created_at":"Wed Aug 31 22:07:29 +0000 2022","id":1565098978223554560,"id_str":"1565098978223554560","full_text":"Teremos um olhar especial para o pequeno produtor e {"_id":"631963be27db1f86f61785a2","created_at":"Fri Aug 05 18:09:50 +0000 2022","id":1555617086407413760,"id_str":"1555617086407413760","full_text":"Neste Dia Nacional da Sa\u00fade, relembramos de {"_id":"631963be27db1f86f617867e","created_at":"Fri Mar 05 15:41:07 +0000 2021","id":1367862746528759816,"id_str":"1367862746528759816","full_text":"Bom dia!
